projectDescription: A web app for team task management with assignments, comments and a calendar view. I want it to run in the browser, be fast and have a dark mode.

prefilledAnswers.answer: Small teams of 3-10 people in IT companies.
No hard deadline, MVP in 2 months.

mockedSuggestions.message: Consider adding a data export requirement (GDPR).
mockedSuggestions.suggestedAction: Generate a 'User data export' requirement under the GDPR section.

mockedSuggestions.message: No component diagram for the calendar view.
mockedSuggestions.suggestedAction: Add a 'Calendar view' section describing components.
